final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original character illustration for a Chinese xianxia-style game, featuring a hanfu-clad woman playing a guqin in a bamboo forest under moonlight.

Style/medium: detailed 2D game character art (立绘 / key visual), ink-wash painting textures blended with digital illustration, reminiscent of Chinese mobile game concept art with ethereal atmosphere
Composition: full-body or three-quarter portrait, centered subject with generous negative space, slightly low camera angle to emphasize flowing robes and otherworldly presence
Subject: elegant young woman in layered, flowing hanfu with long billowing sleeves (衣袂飘飘), seated or kneeling before a guqin, fingers poised on the strings, serene and mysterious expression
Scene/backdrop: dense bamboo grove at night, tall stalks receding into darkness, fallen leaves and mist at ground level
Lighting/mood: cool blue-white moonlight filtering through bamboo canopy, casting dappled, fragmented shadow patterns (斑驳光影) across her robes and the ground; soft, otherworldly, and tranquil
Color palette: deep midnight blue and jade green as environment base, luminous silver-white moonlight as the key light accent, warm ivory and gold embroidery on the hanfu as contrast
Materials/textures: sheer silk fabric with visible translucency and fine embroidered patterns, smooth lacquered guqin surface, rough bamboo bark in background
Avoid: modern clothing details, Western fantasy armor, harsh hard shadows, over-saturated neon colors, watermark, generic anime face without character distinction
